title: Hunter's Moon
description: This Add-on for Enhanced Celestials adds a Hunter's Moon
body:
![Hunter's Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087b2dc594550c6ea80d844ff6d367393610391d.png)
The Hunter's Moon mod adds a new moon to Enhanced Celestials, increasing drops from vanilla mobs.

To add modded mob drops to the increased drops, add them to a #forge:hunters_moon_drops tag in your modpack's datapack.


All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco.

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
